meaning: n.(意大利)苏瓦韦白葡萄酒(一种不带甜味的白葡萄酒)  <意>adj.&adv.[音]甜蜜的(地) 柔和的(地)
examples: ABSTRACT: How do you like Soave wine?
Soave wine is known for its melon-and-orange-zest flavors as well as its ability to improve with age.
ABSTRACT: Vineyards in Italy's Soave wine region have been officially recognised as part of the country's rural heritage.
